column.text:
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• The Cincinnati Reds designated RHP Chris Paddack for assignment.
• Los Angeles Angels designated 1B Trey Mancini for assignment.
• The Angels also designated 3B Nick Madrigal for assignment in a corresponding move.
• Milwaukee Brewers activated RHP Brandon Woodruff from the 15-day injured list.
• The Detroit Tigers activated RHP Casey Mize from the 15-day injured list.
• Chicago White Sox activated C Kyle Teel from the 60-day injured list.
• The Houston Astros placed key reliever RHP Bryan Abreu on the restricted list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
